question: Who in the Amateur Radio Service is called an amateur or an amateur radio operator?

choices.A: A person who is capable of acquiring any equipment for his station to be used for communication
choices.B: A person who broadcast traffic for the general public
choices.C: A person who needs to communicate with his family, co-workers and friends
choices.D: A person who interested in radio technique solely with a personal aim and without pecuniary interest
